notes: All 25 questions include the approved batch fields used in validated batch 01.
Options are represented as an array of {label,text} objects, consistent with the current repo/app contract.
No missing required top-level or per-question fields were found.
The uploaded file still contained pre-correction versions of Q004, Q017, and Q023 despite the textual summary saying those edits had already been applied.
Those three items were corrected during validation using current official sources.
Q024's patched religion-based distractor was confirmed as supportable under Texas Insurance Code §544.002.
No material within-batch duplicates were found.
Cross-batch duplicate review was limited because the full validated bank was not supplied in this validation turn.

flags.issue: The uploaded file still stated that Texas resident agent licensure requires pre-licensing education.
flags.resolution: Corrected the answer text and explanations to track current TDI resident-agent steps: pass the exam before applying, complete fingerprints, and apply through Sircon/NIPR.

flags.issue: The uploaded file still used 2 ethics hours instead of the current 3-hour ethics requirement.
flags.resolution: Corrected option B and related explanations to 24 hours including 3 hours of ethics.

flags.issue: The uploaded file still treated conversion after COBRA as unconditional.
flags.resolution: Made the stem, answer text, and explanation conditional on the group plan actually offering a conversion privilege.

flags.issue: Patched protected-category distractor required confirmation against Texas Insurance Code §544.002.
flags.resolution: Confirmed as supportable; no further change required.

next_step: Safe to ingest into data/questions_validated/ after saving both the validated batch and this report.
